compressed_context:
DEF:NATIONAL-RENEWABLE-ENERGY ACTION-PLAN(NREAP)  
DEF:MEMBER-STATE(MS)  
CLAIM: MS SUBMIT NREAPs [DIR2009/28/EC ART4]  
CTX:NREAPs  
  PROJECTIONS:  
    2010;2011–2020 ANNUAL;2021–2030 ANNUAL∧BIENNIAL  
    SHARE-RENEWABLE-ENERGY  
  POLICY-FRAMEWORK: 2021–2030 WITH ANNUAL ∧ BIENNIAL MILESTONES  
  SECTOR-BREAKDOWN: ELECTRICITY/HEATING-COOLING/TRANSPORT  
  INVESTMENT-NEEDS ∧ REFORM-MEASURES  
  IMPACT-ON-ENERGY-MARKETS ∧ COST-ESTIMATES  

ARTICLE-5: MONITORING ∧ REPORTING [DIR2009/28/EC ART5]  
  MS MONITOR PRODUCTION/IMPORT/CONSUMPTION-RENEWABLE-ENERGY  
  MS REPORT ANNUALLY TO COMMISSION ∧ QUARTERLY FOR STATISTICAL-TRANSFERS  

ARTICLE-13: BIOFUELS ∧ BIOLIQUIDS SUSTAINABILITY-CRITERIA [DIR2009/28/EC ART13]  
  GHG-SAVINGS≥35%(PLANTS≤5-OCT-2015)/≥50%(≥2017)/≥60%(≥2018)  
  NO CONVERSION(HIGH-CARBON-STOCK ∨ PEATLAND)  
  CERTIFICATION-SCHEMES PER ANNEX-VI  
  MS ENSURE COMPLIANCE BEFORE SUPPORT  

ARTICLE-15: GUARANTEES-OF-ORIGIN [DIR2009/28/EC ART15]  
  COMMISSION ESTABLISHES ELECTRONIC-REGISTER(ANNEX-VI)  
  MS ISSUE GUARANTEES PER MWh FROM RENEWABLE VALID≤12M  
  GUARANTEES MUTUALLY RECOGNIZED AMONG MS  

ARTICLE-6: STATISTICAL-TRANSFERS [DIR2009/28/EC ART6]  
  MS MAY TRANSFER UP TO 12% OF NATIONAL TARGET TO OTHER MS (STATISTICAL-ONLY)  
  REQUIREMENTS:  
    NOTIFY COMMISSION OF VOLUME/DURATION/PRICE  
    REPORT TRANSFERS IN NREAP MONITORING  
  COOPERATION: BILATERAL/MULTILATERAL PER ART7–8  

COMMISSION PROJECTION(2014) SHOWS EU-WIDE TRAJECTORY FOR SHARES-DEVELOPMENT
